title: FreshnessViolation
description: Event emitted when a product's freshness SLA is breached.

event_id.description: Unique event identifier for deduplication (UUID format).

domain.description: Domain name this event belongs to.

product_name.description: Product name that freshness SLA was breached.

age_hours.description: How many hours since last successful refresh.

sla_target_hours.description: Maximum allowed hours between refreshes per SLA.

last_refreshed_at.description: Timestamp of the last successful refresh.
